adv_addopt_anon_disabled_msg: {e_warning} Add options only works on named regular polls.
adv_addopt_anon_disabled_toast: ⚠️ Add options only works on named regular polls.
adv_addopt_quiz_disabled: Add options: N/A in quiz mode
adv_addopt_quiz_disabled_msg: {e_warning} Add options unavailable in quiz mode.
adv_addopt_quiz_disabled_toast: ⚠️ Add options unavailable in quiz mode.
adv_geo_screen_title: Select countries (tap to toggle, then tap Done)
adv_multians_quiz_disabled_msg: {e_warning} Multiple answers unavailable in quiz mode.
adv_multians_quiz_disabled_toast: ⚠️ Multiple answers unavailable in quiz mode.
adv_title_msg: Tap any option below to toggle it.
choose_method:
{e_poll_hub} Create a Poll How would you like to build your poll?
{e_menu} Native Telegram Poll Opens Telegram's built-in poll composer. Quick and simple, but limited — no media attachments, no descriptions, no auto-close timer, no geo-restriction, and no members-only filter. Supports anonymous/named and quiz mode. {e_rocket} Advanced Poll A guided wizard with full control. Attach photos, videos, GIFs, or stickers to your question and each option (Advanced+ plan). Set auto-close timers, hide results until closed, shuffle options, allow voters to add their own choices, add a description, and restrict by country or membership tier.
correct_none_selected_toast: ⚠️ Select at least one correct answer.
dash_anon_note: Anonymous poll — individual vote tracking unavailable.
dash_not_poll_toast: ❌ This message is not a poll.
desc_prompt: Enter a poll description (max 1,024 chars) or tap Skip:
dur_invalid: Enter a whole number between 5 and 43,800 minutes.
dur_prompt: Enter number of minutes (5 – 43,800): Examples: 10 = 10 min · 60 = 1 hr · 1440 = 24 hr · 10080 = 7 days
explmedia_step: Add media to the explanation? (optional) Send a photo or video directly — photos and videos only. Or tap Skip to continue without media.
extend_not_supported_body:
The Telegram Bot API doesn't support extending a live poll's timer after it has been sent.

To reset the timer, tap Stop Poll, then use Reuse This Poll to re-send it with a longer duration.
hub_title:
{e_poll_hub} Poll & Quiz Send a Telegram poll or quiz to all your subscribers at once.
Poll types: • Regular — subscribers vote on a question, anonymously or by name • Quiz — one or more correct answers, with an optional explanation shown to anyone who answers incorrectly Free plan: 1 anonymous poll per week. Basic+ unlocks unlimited polls and named polls. Advanced+ unlocks quiz mode and media attachments.
manage_empty: No polls sent yet. Tap Create New Poll to get started.
max_options_reached: Maximum {n} options reached. Proceeding to next step.
native_captured_adv:
Poll captured.

Telegram's composer doesn't support all advanced options. Configure them below, or tap Preview to send as-is.
native_prompt_msg: Tap below to open Telegram's poll creator.
option_added: Option {n} added! Options so far: {options} Type and send the next option as a text message, or tap Done when finished.
option_too_long: Option is too long (max {max} characters). Please try again.
optmedia_step: Add media to option {n}? (optional) Send a photo, video, GIF, or sticker directly. Or tap Skip to continue without media.
preview_hint: Tap Send to broadcast this poll to all subscribers.
qmedia_step: Add media to your question? (optional) Send a photo or video directly. Questions only support photo or video — no GIFs or stickers. Or tap Skip to continue without media.
question_too_long: Question is too long (max {max} characters). Please try again.
results_no_votes_yet: No votes recorded yet. Votes appear here as subscribers respond.
step_anon: Anonymous poll? Anonymous polls hide who voted for what. Named polls show voter names (Advanced+ only).
step_correct:
Which options are correct? Tap each correct answer to select it, then tap Done. Subscribers who pick wrong will be shown your explanation.
You can mark more than one correct answer.
step_explanation: Explanation (optional) Send a short message shown to subscribers who answer incorrectly. This helps reinforce the right answer. Max 200 characters — or tap Skip to leave it empty.
step_first_option:
Great question! Type your first answer option and send it as a text message (max 100 characters per option). You can add 1–12 options total.
After each option you'll be asked if you want to attach media. Option media supports photo, video, GIF, and sticker — more flexible than the question.
step_mode: Poll type? Choose Regular for an opinion poll, or Quiz to set a correct answer.
step_question:
{e_poll_hub} Create a Poll Type your poll question and send it as a text message (max 300 characters). Example: What is your favourite feature?
After this step you can optionally attach a photo or video to your question. Questions only support photo or video — no GIFs or stickers at question level.
upgrade_prompt:
Polls Free plan includes 1 anonymous poll per week. Upgrade for unlimited polls and more features.
Basic unlocks unlimited polls and named polls · Advanced unlocks quiz mode and poll media attachments.
voters_anon_warn: This poll is anonymous — voter identities are not available.
